name: public_apis_animals_count
description: Fetch public APIs list, count and report all APIs in the Animals category

tasks.name: Fetch public APIs data
tasks.description: You MUST call http_request to fetch data from https://api.publicapis.org/entries. Output the complete response body verbatim, not a summary. Downstream tasks need the raw JSON data to parse. Do NOT summarize as 'data was fetched' — include the full response text.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains raw JSON response from the API endpoint with 'entries' field present

tasks.name: Count and extract Animals category APIs
tasks.description: You MUST call python_exec to analyze task_001's output. Write Python code that: (1) parses the JSON response, (2) filters entries where Category == 'Animals' (case-sensitive), (3) counts them, (4) extracts their API names/titles. Output format: A dictionary with 'count' (integer) and 'names' (list of strings). Use the FULL raw data from task_001 — do NOT invent or hallucinate API names. If no Animals category found, output count=0 and empty list.
tasks.success_criteria: Output contains a dictionary with 'count' key (integer >= 0) and 'names' key (list), derived from task_001 data

tasks.name: Write final report
tasks.description: You MUST call file_write to save the results from task_002 to a file named 'animals_apis_report.txt'. Format the output as: 'Total Animals APIs: [count]' followed by a numbered list of API names from task_002. Use the exact count and names from task_002 — do NOT modify or invent data.
tasks.success_criteria: File animals_apis_report.txt created with count number and list of API names matching task_002 output

metadata.goal: Count and list Animals category APIs from public APIs directory
